schemeContent.detailedDescription_md:
Ayushman Bharat PM-JAY Mukhmantri Sehat Bima Yojana (AB PM-JAY MMSBY), was launched on 20 August 2019 this is a flagship State Health Insurance Scheme for the beneficiaires of State of Punjab. AB PM-JAY MMSBY will provide financial protection to 65% population of state of Punjab. It is entitlement based cashless Health Insurance cover. Under this scheme cashless and paperless treatment is available at Government and empaneled Private hospitals.
<br>
schemeContent.benefits_md: - A cashless health insurance  cover of ₹5,00,000/- rupees per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization (in-patient services) for treatment of listed diseases and medical conditions.
schemeContent.briefDescription: "AYUSHMAN BHARAT PM-JAY MUKH MANTRI SEHAT BIMA YOJNA” is a flagship State Health Insurance Program of the Government of Punjab.

AB PM-JAY MMSBY will provide financial protection to 65% population of state of Punjab. It is entitlement based cashless Health Insurance cover. Under this scheme cashless and paperless treatment is available at Government and empaneled Private hospitals.

A cashless health insurance  cover of ₹5,00,000/- rupees per family per year for secondary and tertiary care hospitalization (in-patient services) for treatment of listed diseases and medical conditions.

applicationProcess.process_md:
> **REGISTRATION PROCESS FOR E-CARD GENERATION**


- Now generate e-card from home without visiting anywhere: Download 'Ayushman App' on mobile or visit [https://beneficiary.nha.gov.in/](https://beneficiary.nha.gov.in/) to self-register.- Please visit any empaneled private or public hospital, lists available under '[Hospitals](https://sha.punjab.gov.in/shapb/publicPages/hospSpltyView)' on SHA website for getting e-card generation.

eligibilityCriteria.eligibilityDescription_md:
1. Residents of Punjab. 
1. Applicants should be from the following categories

  - SECC 2011 data families, 
  - Smart Ration Card holder families, 
  - J-Form holder farmers, 
  - Small traders registered with Excise & Taxation Department, 
  - Small & Marginal Farmers, 
  - Accredited & Yellow Card Journalist and Construction workers registered with Punjab Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.

children.text: Applicants should be from the following categories
Small traders registered with Excise & Taxation Department,
Accredited & Yellow Card Journalist and Construction workers registered with Punjab Building & Other Construction Workers Welfare Board.
